visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in a brightly lit warehouse store, wearing a white blouse with blue denim-style puffed sleeves. She holds up a set of glass storage containers featuring cartoon characters. (2) The camera zooms in on a shelf with pricing information and 'Black Friday' labels. (3) The woman handles several round glass bowls with colored lids (green, pink, purple), pointing out the Moomin illustrations on the glass surface while smiling at the camera. (4) Close-up shots of the bowls rotating reveal different character designs; the background shows shoppers with carts in the warehouse aisles. (5) The woman demonstrates removing a purple lid from a glass bowl, showcasing its thickness and the variety of sizes in the set. (6) She poses with the full set of stacked bowls against the backdrop of industrial shelving units filled with household goods.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 大家搶著買. [Variety]: 黑五好康. [Slogan]: 超可愛嚕嚕米玻璃保鮮盒. (2) [Subtitle]: 156662 PYREX X MOOMIN STORAGE 圓形玻璃保鮮盒. [Subtitle]: 含蓋8件組. [Variety]: BLACK FRIDAY. [Variety]: 599 - 120. [Variety]: $ 479. (3) [Variety]: 嚕嚕米. [Variety]: 小不點. [Variety]: 阿斯. (4) [Variety]: 50元. [Variety]: 洗碗機. [Variety]: 冷凍. [Variety]: 微波.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character, approximately 7 other shoppers visible in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse with denim-accented puffed sleeves and a black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Large warehouse store interior (Costco) with high ceilings, industrial metal shelving packed with boxes, and shoppers with carts in the aisles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a female voice speaking with high energy and a positive tone, accompanied by an upbeat electronic background track. (2) A sharp mechanical 'click' as the woman sets a bowl down triggers a new phase, with a male voice adding enthusiastic commentary. (3) A digital 'ding' sound effect punctuates the transition as the price tag is discussed. (4) Distinct glass-on-glass clinking occurs as the bowls are handled. (5) A 'pop' sound effect coincides with the lid being removed from the container. (6) The vocal density increases as the speakers list the various technical features of the glassware over the continuous, steady rhythm of the BGM.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Detailed Showcase -> Features/Utility -> Pricing.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and showcase the Pyrex X Moomin glass storage set available at Costco during the Black Friday sale, highlighting the aesthetic appeal and practical utility.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, price tags, and clear branding of Pyrex and Moomin within the warehouse context.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media 'haul' aesthetics with high text density and upbeat audio to capture attention for limited-time retail discounts.
